description_long: This object is an open book with two thick, rectangular pages, one of which is inscribed with lines of text and decorative corner elements. The book is set on a flat, dark-colored base that resembles a hardcover binding, with a visible central crease where the book opens. The left page features ornate border designs and faint, stylized writing, while the right page is blank and unadorned. The book's pages are thick and appear to be made of a solid, possibly stone-like or heavy paper material, giving it a monumental or commemorative appearance. The overall color palette is muted, with cream or beige pages and a dark maroon or brown base. There are no visible illustrations, publisher logos, or dust jackets, and the spine is not visible in any view.
description: An open, thick book with one inscribed page and a dark, flat base, featuring ornate borders and a muted color palette.
description_view_0: The left page with ornate borders and text is fully visible, while the right page is blank; the book's thickness and base are clearly seen.
description_view_1: A direct top-down view showing both pages side by side, with the left page inscribed and the right page blank; the central crease is visible.
description_view_2: The blank right page is most prominent, with the inscribed left page partially visible; the book's thickness is emphasized.
description_view_3: The inscribed left page is fully visible, while the blank right page is seen from the side; the base and central crease are also visible.
